prevalence.source: European occupational health and neurology epidemiology syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis with confirmatory nerve conduction studies when needed

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; occupational health pathways vary
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to conservative care and timely surgery

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: High access to electrodiagnostics and hand surgery in many member states
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Splinting, steroid injection, and surgical decompression when indicated; workplace ergonomic interventions
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for elective surgery in some systems
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Robust occupational health and surgical services in many member states
